commands.name: project
commands.description: Command responsible for managing projects.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new project.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list the created projects.

commands.name: service
commands.description: Command responsible for managing services.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new service.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list the project's services.

commands.name: module
commands.description: Command responsible for managing modules.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new module.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list the modules of a service.

commands.name: entity
commands.description: Command responsible for managing entities.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new entity.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Command used to edit an existing entity.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list the entities of a service or module.

commands.name: enumeration
commands.description: Command responsible for managing enumerations.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new enumeration.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Command used to edit an existing enumeration.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list the enumerations of a service or module.

commands.name: value-object
commands.description: Command responsible for managing value objects.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new value object.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Command used to edit an existing value object.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Command used to list the value objects of a service or 
module.

commands.name: query
commands.description: Command responsible for managing queries.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new query.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list an entity’s queries.

commands.name: command
commands.description: Command responsible for managing commands.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new command.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list an entity’s commands.

commands.name: api
commands.description: Command responsible for managing APIs.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new API.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list an entity’s APIs.

commands.name: page
commands.description: Command responsible for managing pages.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new page.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command used to list an entity’s pages.

commands.name: database
commands.description: Command responsible for managing database migrations.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Command used to create a new migration.

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Command used to apply pending migrations.

commands.name: revert
commands.description: Command used to revert the last created migration.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Command used to list the database migrations of a service 
or module.

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Command responsible for managing the project’s features.

commands.name: job-scheduler
commands.description: Command responsible for managing the project’s job scheduler.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Command used to add a job scheduler to the project.

commands.name: web-app
commands.description:
Command responsible for managing the project's web 
applications.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Command used to add a web application to the project.

commands.name: auth
commands.description:
Command responsible for managing the project's authentication
and authorization.

commands.name: add
commands.description:
Command used to add authentication and authorization to the
project.

commands.name: user
commands.description: Command responsible for managing users.

commands.name: register
commands.description: Command used to register a new user.

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Command responsible for managing user authentication.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Command to log in to the system.

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Command to log out of the system.

commands.name: preferences
commands.description: Command to manage user preferences.

commands.name: culture
commands.description: Command to manage the application's language/culture.

commands.name: set

options.name: --name
options.description:
en | pt | es | de | fr | it | ja | ko | ru | 
zh

commands.description: Performs the change of language/culture used by the tool.
